# nlohmann/json

Place `json.hpp` here.  Download it from:
https://github.com/nlohmann/json/releases/latest → single_include/nlohmann/json.hpp

Quick download (PowerShell):
    Invoke-WebRequest `
      -Uri "https://github.com/nlohmann/json/releases/download/v3.11.3/json.hpp" `
      -OutFile "json.hpp"

Or via curl:
    curl -L -o json.hpp https://github.com/nlohmann/json/releases/download/v3.11.3/json.hpp
